title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Medlife - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Medlife - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Medlife invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife:
Medlife is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife!
